articles.title: Magnetoresistance Oscillations in Few-Layer NbSe₂ in Superconducting Fluctuation Regime
articles.title_zh: 超导涨落体系中少层 NbSe2 的磁阻振荡
articles.abstract: Author(s): Xiaolong Yin, Congzhe Cao, Yibin Feng, Kenji Watanabe, Takashi Taniguchi, Jiawei Mei, Qi-Kun Xue, and Shuo-Ying Yang The observation of magnetoresistance oscillation in NbSe 2 thin films, reminiscent of Little-Parks oscillations, is attributed to superconducting phase fluctuations unlike other previously reported oscillations. [Phys. Rev. Lett. 136, 146301] Published Mon Apr 06, 2026
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：Xiaolong Yin、Congzhe Cao、Yibin Feng、Kenji Watanabe、Takashi Taniguchi、Jiawei Mei、Qi-Kun Xu 和 Shuo-Ying Yang NbSe 2 薄膜中磁阻振荡的观察，让人想起 Little-Parks 振荡，与之前报道的其他振荡不同，它归因于超导相位波动。 [物理。莱特牧师。 136, 146301] 发布于 2026 年 4 月 6 日星期一
authors: Xiaolong Yin, Congzhe Cao, Yibin Feng, Kenji Watanabe, Takashi Taniguchi, Jiawei Mei, Qi-Kun Xue, and Shuo-Ying Yang

articles.title: Parity Anomalous Semimetal with Minimal Conductivity Induced by an In-Plane Magnetic Field
articles.title_zh: 面内磁场诱导的具有最小电导率的宇称反常半金属
articles.abstract: Author(s): Binbin Wang, Jiayuan Hu, Bo Fu, Jiaqi Li, Yunchuan Kong, Kai-Zhi Bai, Shun-Qing Shen, and Di Xiao The interplay between topological materials and local symmetry breaking yields diverse topological quantum phenomena. A notable example is the parity-anomalous semimetal (PAS), which hosts a single unpaired gapless Dirac cone with a half-integer quantized Hall conductivity. Here, we realize this pha… [Phys. Rev. Lett. 136, 146602] Published Mon Apr 06, 2026
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：王彬彬、胡嘉媛、付博、李家齐、孔云川、白开智、沉顺庆、肖迪 拓扑材料与局域对称性破缺之间的相互作用产生了多种拓扑量子现象。一个著名的例子是奇偶校验反常半金属（PAS），它具有单个不成对的无间隙狄拉克锥，具有半整数量子化霍尔电导率。在这里，我们意识到这个阶段...... [物理。莱特牧师。 136, 146602] 发布于 2026 年 4 月 6 日星期一
authors: Binbin Wang, Jiayuan Hu, Bo Fu, Jiaqi Li, Yunchuan Kong, Kai-Zhi Bai, Shun-Qing Shen, and Di Xiao
